'''Deebo Chak''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Actor/Legends|actor]]. One of his earliest parts was as the charismatic Soldier in [[Hishinu Booj]]'s ''[[The Trickery of Vosdia Nooma]]''. His character encouraged [[Farmer/Legends|farmers]] to resist the heavy taxes imposed by the [[Baron/Legends|baron]]. Chak portrayed his character with a gravelly voice.

==Appearances==
*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|52|life/13418_2.html|Rodian Campaigning Mixes Drama & Politics}} {{1st}}
